label: Xanister Majere
description: A mysterious, lithe elf with sharp, attractive features and pale grey eyes that glitter with barely concealed mischief. His black hair is cropped short on the sides but left longer on top, often artfully disheveled. He wears the black and white motley of a court jester—a fitted doublet split down the middle in contrasting halves, with matching parti-colored hose and soft-soled shoes. A half-mask of polished white porcelain covers the upper portion of his face, its expression frozen in an enigmatic smile.
personality: Hedonistic and unapologetically selfish, he treats life as a stage built for his pleasure and everyone else as an improv partner. He’s effortlessly charming—funny, daring, and disarmingly affectionate—so people excuse him long before they notice the strings he’s pulling. Carefree to the point of recklessness, he isn’t sadistic or cruel; he’s simply indifferent to collateral damage when he wants something, and he vanishes the moment consequences arrive.
